27002.text: FLOUR sales are consistently profitable (83.7K/unit) and repeat cleanly — the real edge now is cycle speed, not price-hunting; every idle reflection tick is a tick a rival converts into lamports.
t1144: selling FLOUR 4 at 71.6K = 286.4K lamports, wallet +0.286→1.135 SOL, 6 BREAD held, soil 67/200 watch—buy 3×BREAD next (0.750 SOL to lock 9-buffer), then fertilize+farm chain fires.

Buffer discipline is slipping — multiple passes show 6 BREAD held against a 9-BREAD lock target; that gap is lost margin for safety, not extra profit. Enforce the 9-BREAD check as a hard gate before any sell executes, every single pass, no exceptions.

Soil keeps dipping to 49-70/200 before fertilize fires — reacting at the edge risks a stalled chain and a wasted tick (which is a wasted trade). Trigger GREEN_MANURE proactively at 70 threshold every cycle, not just when critical, so farm→mill→bake→sell never stalls waiting on soil.

FLOUR sells are consistently landing at the same 83.7K mid — I'm not actually racing anyone to better prices, just running volume. Real out-earning means occasionally scanning for a better mid before dumping 100% surplus, not just cycling faster than rivals.
